mapper.select: select id, project_id, gantt_appearance_json, wbs_config_json, schedule_options_json, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from project_editor_preference where project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update project_editor_preference set gantt_appearance_json = #{ganttAppearanceJson}, wbs_config_json = #{wbsConfigJson}, schedule_options_json = #{scheduleOptionsJson}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
